message:
Fix crash in replace operator with immutable null bitmaps (#5696)

## Summary

Fixes a crash in the `replace` operator when processing arrays with
immutable null bitmaps (e.g., from `ocsf::cast` operator).

The issue occurred when `replace what="", with=null` was applied to OCSF
DNS Activity events after schema casting. The crash resulted from
attempting to mutate an immutable Arrow buffer returned by
`array->null_bitmap()`. The fix follows the pattern from `series.cpp` by
using `arrow::internal::CopyBitmap()` to ensure the bitmap is mutable
before modification.

## Changes

**libtenzir/builtins/operators/replace.cpp:**
- Added `#include "tenzir/arrow_memory_pool.hpp"`
- When a bitmap exists: copy it via `CopyBitmap()` to ensure mutability
- When no bitmap exists: allocate fresh and initialize all bits to valid
(preserving the original semantics)

**Test cases added** in `test/tests/operators/replace/`:
- `replace-with-null.tql` - Basic replace with null operation
- `replace-sliced-array.tql` - Tests sliced arrays with non-zero offsets
(core bug scenario)
- `replace-with-null-preserves-existing.tql` - Verifies pre-existing
null values are preserved
- `replace-numeric-with-null.tql` - Tests numeric type replacement with
null

## Test Plan

- All 272 operator tests pass, including 5 replace operator tests
- New tests specifically cover the immutable bitmap case (sliced arrays)
- Existing tests verify backward compatibility

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+---
+title: Fix assertion failure in replace operator when replacing with null
+type: bugfix
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+pr: 5696
+created: 2026-01-29T08:51:10.900215Z
+---
+
+The `replace` operator no longer triggers an assertion failure when using
+`with=null` on data processed by operators like `ocsf::cast`.
+
+```tql
+load_file "dns.json"
+read_json
+ocsf::cast "dns_activity"
+replace what="", with=null
+```

@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+// This test verifies the fix for assertion failure in replace operator when
+// processing arrays with immutable null bitmaps (e.g., from ocsf::cast).
+// On main without the fix, this triggers: assertion `null_bitmap_data` failed
+from {
+  class_uid: 4003,
+  activity_id: 1,
+  query: {hostname: null},
+  severity_id: 1,
+  status_id: 1,
+  time: 2024-01-01,
+  type_uid: 400301,
+  metadata: {
+    version: "1.0.0",
+    product: {name: "test", vendor_name: "test"},
+  },
+}
+ocsf::cast
+replace what="test", with=null
+select metadata.product
